hero.bio: Front-end developer specializing in <0>complex web platforms</0> — teleconsultation, EdTech, marketplaces. I builds <1>real-time</1> interfaces with React, Next.js and TypeScript, designed for performance, UX and maintainability.

sections.work_desc: A selection of platforms I've worked on — from double-sided marketplaces to critical real-time applications. Each project, a different business context.

about.text: <0>I</0> am interested in <1>useful</1> products, <2>ambitious</2> startups and <3>demanding</3> technical environments. Co-founder of <4>Tàgg Group</4>, I work on React / Next.js / TypeScript architectures with advanced state management and special attention to performance, UX and maintainability.
about.quote: Building interfaces that respect both <0>the end user</0> and <1>the next developer</1>.

contact.title: A project <0>in mind</0>?<1 />Let's talk.
contact.availability_text: Open to freelance missions, ambitious startup collaborations and demanding technical environments. Remote or in Dakar.

yello.context: Yello is an EdTech platform that transforms educational content (PDFs, videos, audios) into interactive learning modules. The goal is to make learning more accessible, structured, and engaging through artificial intelligence. The platform is used at scale by thousands of learners.
yello.goal:
• Simplify educational content creation
• Improve learner engagement
• Enable fast learning via interactive formats (microlearning)
• Offer a personalized experience based on user content
yello.role:
Senior Frontend Developer

Active participation in the design and development of the user interface and the implementation of key product-oriented features.
yello.achievements:
• Development of dynamic interfaces with React / Next.js for interactive learning paths
• Implementation of intelligent features: automatic quiz generation, flashcard creation, content summaries
• Development of an educational chatbot allowing users to interact with their content
• Setup of progress tracking dashboards for learners
• API integration for content and user data management
• Management of complex states and frontend performance optimization
yello.challenges:
• Management of AI-generated dynamic content
• Maintaining high performance despite large data volumes
• Designing a smooth UX for complex learning paths
• Data synchronization across multiple interactive modules
yello.impact:
• Platform used by +200,000 learners
• Contribution to a solution ranked among the best educational apps in Senegal
• Improved user engagement through interactive formats
• Reduced educational content creation time

sapiow.context: Marketplace connecting knowledge seekers and experts for paid mentoring sessions.
sapiow.goal: Facilitate knowledge sharing through a seamless platform connecting experts and learners worldwide.
sapiow.role: Lead Front-end. Next.js architecture setup and integration of critical third-party services.
sapiow.achievements: Optimized booking tunnel, real-time messaging via GetStream.io, and full Stripe payment flow integration.
sapiow.challenges: Complex multi-timezone availability synchronization and securing pre-session exchanges.
sapiow.impact: Successful launch with steady monthly growth in booked sessions.

edaktarii.context: eDaktarii is a telemedicine platform connecting patients and doctors remotely via video consultations. It aims to facilitate access to care, particularly between Africa and the diaspora.
edaktarii.goal:
• Enable remote medical consultation
• Simplify appointment booking with healthcare professionals
• Ensure online accessible patient follow-up
• Offer a smooth and secure experience
edaktarii.role:
Frontend Developer

Participation in the development of the user interface and critical flows related to teleconsultation.
edaktarii.achievements:
• Development of video teleconsultation interfaces
• Implementation of an appointment booking system with slot management
• Integration of secure payment flows for consultations
• Development of patient follow-up and consultation interfaces
• Management of complex states related to sessions and user interactions
• Optimization of user experience on web and mobile
edaktarii.challenges:
• Management of real-time flows (consultation, appointments)
• Designing simple interfaces for a medical context
• Management of sensitive data (confidentiality and security)
• Smooth experience across different types of devices
edaktarii.impact:
• Implementation of a remotely accessible health solution
• Improved access to care for international users
• Platform available 24/7 for medical consultations

soveur.context: Soveur is a marketplace platform connecting clients with service providers (hairdressing, plumbing, etc.) with online booking and geolocation.
soveur.goal:
• Facilitate client ↔ provider matching
• Enable fast service booking
• Offer simple management of availability and services
• Optimize user experience for on-demand services
soveur.role:
Frontend / Fullstack Developer

Contribution to the development of the platform's core features.
soveur.achievements:
• Development of a marketplace interface for service management
• Implementation of the booking system with availability management
• Integration of provider geolocation
• Development of online payment flows
• Management of user interactions (search, selection, booking)
• Optimization of performance and user experience
soveur.challenges:
• Management of complex booking flows
• Real-time availability synchronization
• Smooth user experience on a multi-step journey
• Management of data related to services and users
soveur.impact:
• Implementation of a functional multi-service marketplace
• Simplification of access to home services
• Improvement of user booking experience

exploration de données.context: Development of a web interface allowing researchers to explore, filter, and analyze a vast scientific database. The tool facilitates access to information and improves research efficiency through optimized navigation in large data volumes.
exploration de données.goal:
• Simplify access to complex scientific data
• Enable fast and accurate searching
• Offer advanced exploration tools (filters, sorting, navigation)
• Improve the user experience for expert profiles (researchers)
exploration de données.role:
Frontend / Fullstack Developer

Design and development of the exploration interface and advanced search features.
exploration de données.achievements:
• Development of a data exploration interface with smooth navigation over large volumes
• Implementation of advanced search systems (dynamic filters, sorting, pagination)
• Design of high-performance interactive data tables
• API integration for retrieval and management of scientific data
• Performance optimization to ensure a smooth experience despite high volume
• UX improvement to facilitate data analysis and reading
exploration de données.challenges:
• Management of large amounts of data (data-intensive)
• Rendering and performance optimization on the frontend
• Design of an intuitive interface for expert users
• Structuring and displaying complex data
exploration de données.impact:
• Significant improvement in scientific data access and exploration
• Time savings for researchers in their analyses
• More intuitive interface for navigating complex datasets
• Better exploitation of available data

dashboard administratif.context: Development of an administrative dashboard for centralizing and visualizing real-time operational data for a call center. The tool is designed for supervision teams to monitor activity, analyze performance, and make quick decisions.
dashboard administratif.goal:
• Centralize operational data in a single tool
• Provide real-time visibility into call center performance
• Facilitate team and activity management
• Improve responsiveness to incidents or workload variations
dashboard administratif.role:
Frontend / Fullstack Developer

Design and development of visualization interfaces and real-time monitoring features.
dashboard administratif.achievements:
• Development of an interactive dashboard for real-time monitoring of key indicators (calls, agents, performance)
• Integration of dynamic data streams for continuous information updates
• Design of graphs and visualizations to facilitate operational data analysis
• Development of supervision interfaces for agent and activity tracking
• Optimization of the user experience for quick reading of critical data
• State management and real-time data synchronization
dashboard administratif.challenges:
• Real-time data stream management
• Performance optimization with constantly updated data
• Design of readable interfaces for large volumes of information
• Synchronization between different data sources
dashboard administratif.impact:
• Improved visibility into call center performance
• Support for quick decision-making through real-time data
• Optimization of agent and operation monitoring
• Reduced reaction time to incidents

istamco.context: Development of a business CRM dedicated to international transport (freight forwarding), allowing for the management of logistical operations, clients, and data flows related to shipments.
istamco.goal:
• Digitalize logistical processes
• Centralize shipment and client management
• Offer reporting and analysis tools
• Improve operational efficiency
istamco.role:
Fullstack Developer (Consultant)

Design and development of the application with a focus on frontend architecture and data management.
istamco.achievements:
• Development of a logistics CRM with Angular and TypeScript
• Implementation of a scalable architecture with state management and RxJS
• Development of analytical dashboards (Chart.js, ECharts)
• Creation of advanced interfaces for shipment and data management
• Implementation of export systems (Excel, PDF) for business reporting
• Integration of complex components (calendars, dynamic tables)
istamco.challenges:
• Management of large volumes of logistical data
• Designing interfaces adapted to complex business workflows
• Optimization of performance on interactive dashboards
• Structuring a scalable architecture
istamco.impact:
• Digitalization of logistical business processes
• Improved operational tracking and productivity
• Implementation of analytical tools for decision-making

marketplace p2p.context: Development of a peer-to-peer (P2P) marketplace allowing users to exchange goods via different modes: bartering, direct purchase, or real-time price negotiation. The platform aims to offer a flexible alternative to classic marketplaces by integrating multiple transaction modes into a single experience.
marketplace p2p.goal:
• Allow users to buy, sell, or exchange products
• Introduce a real-time negotiation system
• Offer a smooth experience on complex transactional paths
• Create a flexible platform adapted to different user behaviors
marketplace p2p.role:
Frontend / Fullstack Developer

Participation in the design and development of the platform's core features.
marketplace p2p.achievements:
• Development of a multi-mode marketplace interface (purchase, bartering, negotiation)
• Implementation of a real-time negotiation system between users
• Design of user flows for transactions (posting, offering, accepting)
• Development of ad management and interaction interfaces
• API integration for product, user, and transaction management
• Optimization of the user experience on multi-step paths
marketplace p2p.challenges:
• Management of complex transactional flows (purchase vs bartering vs negotiation)
• Real-time exchange synchronization between users
• Design of a clear UX despite the complexity of options
• Management of multiple transaction-related states
marketplace p2p.impact:
• Implementation of an innovative multi-mode marketplace
• Enriched user experience with real-time negotiation
• Increased flexibility in peer-to-peer transactions
• Improved engagement through dynamic interactions
